edge_retention.description: How long the blade holds a usable edge under a standardized cut-test protocol.
edge_retention.methodology: 200 slices of 1-inch sisal rope, measured against reference BESS score drift.

steel_quality.description: Composite of carbon content, hardness (HRC), grain structure, and heat treatment quality.
steel_quality.methodology: Material spec + Rockwell test + microscopy where available.

balance.description: Weight distribution and pinch-point feel during extended use.

handle_ergonomics.description: Comfort and control over a fatigue protocol.
handle_ergonomics.methodology: 45-minute continuous mince + rock-chop session, graded against blister/fatigue checklist.

out_of_box_sharpness.description: Factory edge quality before any honing.
out_of_box_sharpness.methodology: Single-trial BESS test on unopened unit.

fit_and_finish.description: Quality of grinds, handle-to-bolster transitions, spine rounding, overall build.

corrosion_resistance.description: Resistance to patina/rust under realistic home-kitchen humidity.
corrosion_resistance.methodology: 14-day humidity cabinet exposure after controlled acidic-food contact.

products.name: Nakamura Hamono Aogami #2 Gyuto 210mm
products.description: Third-generation single-smith forge, ~18 knives per month.

products.name: Konosuke HD2 Wa-Gyuto 240mm
products.description: Laser-thin geometry, semi-stainless HD2. The balance benchmark.

products.name: Tojiro DP VG10 Gyuto 210mm
products.description: The entry point to serious Japanese knives. $85 and still sharp out of the box.

products.name: Yoshikane SKD Nashiji Gyuto 210mm
products.description: Semi-stainless SKD. Sweet spot between carbon performance and stainless convenience.

products.name: Takamura R2 Migaki Gyuto 210mm
products.description: Laser-thin R2 powdered steel. Out-of-box sharpness is elite.

products.name: Masamoto KS Gyuto 210mm
products.description: Tokyo institution. Favored by professional Japanese kitchens.

products.name: Mazaki Kurouchi White #2 Gyuto 210mm
products.description: Aggressive reactive carbon. Purist pick, demanding maintenance.

products.name: Yoshiaki Fujiwara Denka Gyuto 240mm
products.description: Waitlist-only. Aogami Super at 65 HRC. Heavy 240.

products.name: Hitohira Togashi Stainless Gyuto 210mm
products.description: Sakai-forged stainless. Precision geometry, zero-maintenance steel.

products.name: Misono UX10 Gyuto 210mm
products.description: Pro-kitchen favorite. Swedish stainless at 60 HRC.

products.name: Masutani VG-10 Wa-Gyuto 240mm
products.description: Echizen VG-10 with a wa handle. Understated, precise, durable.

products.name: MAC MTH-80 Professional 8-inch
products.description: Wirecutter perennial. Thin, nimble, stainless.

products.name: Victorinox Fibrox Pro 8-inch Chef
products.description: The $52 workhorse. Soft steel, grippy handle, sharp enough.

products.name: Mercer Culinary Millennia 8-inch
products.description: NSF-certified commercial kitchen standard. Cheap and durable.

products.name: Misen Chef's Knife 8-inch
products.description: Kickstarter-era DTC. Heavy marketing, hybrid profile.

products.name: Tojiro Basic Bolstered Gyuto 210mm
products.description: Tojiro's sub-entry. Great value under $70.

products.name: Wusthof Classic 8-inch Chef's Knife
products.description: Ubiquitous forged German. Soft, heavy, durable.

products.name: Henckels Professional S 8-inch Chef
products.description: Wusthof competitor. Slightly softer, heavier.

products.name: Global G-2 Classic 8-inch Chef
products.description: Stainless-handled, dimpled grip. Polarizing ergonomics.

products.name: Shun Classic 8-inch Chef
products.description: Kai Corp flagship. Damascus cladding is cosmetic.

products.name: Zwilling Four Star 8-inch
products.description: Seamless handle. Another soft German workhorse.

products.name: Made In Chef Knife 8-inch
products.description: DTC, French-forged. Marketing-heavy.

products.name: Material The Almost 7.5" Knife
products.description: Design-forward. Short length is polarizing.

products.name: Hedley & Bennett Chef's 8-inch
products.description: Kitchen-apparel brand's knife play. Solid, not special.

products.name: Fujiwara Kanefusa FKM Gyuto 210mm
products.description: Seki workhorse. Underrated value around $100.

products.name: Sakai Takayuki 33-Layer Damascus Gyuto 210mm
products.description: VG-10 damascus at a fair price. Solid all-rounder.

products.name: Tadafusa Hocho Kobo Gyuto 210mm
products.description: SLD semi-stainless. Quiet overperformer.

products.name: Dexter-Russell Sani-Safe 8-inch
products.description: Commercial kitchen standard. Indestructible, unloved.

products.name: Messermeister Meridian Elité 8-inch
products.description: Forged German, lighter than Wusthof. No bolster.

products.name: Miyabi Artisan SG2 8-inch
products.description: Zwilling-owned premium line. SG2 core with theatrical cladding.

products.name: Opinel Parallèle 8-inch Chef
products.description: Swedish steel, French wood. Underrated light chef.

products.name: Kiwi Cookshop 8-inch
products.description: Southeast-Asian street-cook favorite. Cheap, sharp-ish, rusts.

products.name: Yaxell Mon 8-inch
products.description: VG-10 with canvas micarta. Understated.

products.name: Shibazi F208-2 Chinese Cleaver
products.description: Classic Yangjiang cleaver. Different tool, included for breadth.
